name: City Air Battle
short_description: City Air Battle is a flying racing and shooting game where you will pilot a fighter jet to compete with opponents in the air over real cities, hitting various targets and avoiding buildings. You can also engage in intense aerial battles with opponents.
detailed_description:
City Air Battle is a racing and shooting game where you pilot a fighter jet over a real city, competing in air races between skyscrapers, hitting various targets and avoiding buildings. You can also engage in intense aerial battles with opponents, constantly improving your flying and shooting skills in fast-paced and high-intensity battles.

There are 3 cities in the game, all of which are based on the modeling of large cities in reality. All buildings and streets are the same as those of real cities.

Each level has a score ranking list, which allows players to compete with netizens all over the world and encourages players to constantly break through the score limit.
